description: Ground support packages, tools, modules, workflows, and agents for GroundControl.

packages.name: Hello World
packages.description: A minimal example package demonstrating the grndctrl-delta structure. Useful as a template for new packages.

actions.name: say_hello
actions.description: Returns a greeting for the given name.

modules.name: GC Logging
modules.description: Shared structured logging helpers used by all packages. Writes JSON log entries to the GroundControl log path.

workflows.name: Daily File Summary
workflows.description: Scans the reports folder each morning for new files and writes a structured summary to outputs/. A starter example showing scheduled workflow structure.

agents.name: File Ops Agent
agents.description: A minimal agent with read/write file permissions. Good starting point for workflows that process local files.
